content_en:
738 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

the first three to enter the Hellfire.

Haarithah ibn Wahb related that the Prophet #¢ said, “Shall I not inform you about the dwellers of Paradise? Every weak person who is Mustad’if (numble and unknown because he seeks little from the world) — were he to swear by Allah (to do something, for something to occur, etc.), Allah would answer him (and thus make his oath become fulfilled). Shall I not inform you about the dwellers of the Hellfire? Every Ulullin (one who is harsh and severe in arguing for falsehood), Jawaadh (harsh and arrogant in his walking), haughty one.” (Bukhaaree and Muslim)

Ibn ‘Abbaas -# reported that the Messenger of Allah 2% said, “The dweller of Paradise is he who filled his two ears with the good praises of people, and he hears them; and the dweller of the Hellfire is he who fills his ears with the evil praises of people, and he hears

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 739

them.” (Related by At-Tabaraanee) Ibn Maajah related the same through a different chain.

Ibn ‘Abbaas # related that the Messenger of Allah 2% said, “I will inform you of your men from the dwellers of Paradise: the Prophet is in Paradise; the truthful one is in Paradise; the martyr is in Paradise; the man who visits his brother on the side of the city, not visiting him. except for Allah, is in Paradise; and your women, who are beloved and fertile, are from the dwellers of Paradise - that woman who, when her husband becomes angry - goes to him, placing her hand upon him, and then saying, ‘I will not taste any sleep until you are pleased.” (Related by Al-Qaadee Abu ‘Ubaid ‘Alee ibn Al-Husain) An-Nasaaee related a part of it through a different chain.

We have already mentioned that in an authentic hadith the Messenger of Allah 2% said, “I looked into Paradise, and I saw that most of its dwellers were the poor, and I looked into the Hellfire and saw that most of its dwellers were the rich.”

Those Who Praise Allah ‘Azza Wa-Jall (To Him belongs Might and Majesty) During Both Good And Bad Times Are The First To Be Called On The Day Of Resurrection To Enter Paradise

meee PM we enennne

740 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

The People Of The nation Of Muhammad #¢ Constitute The Greatest Number Of Dwellers In Paradise And They Are The Highest In Ranking And Degree

The people of this nation constitute most of the dwellers of Paradise; they will be the richest therein, having the highest stations. And they are mainly from the early generations of Islam, as Allah % said in describing the foremost ones:

“A multitude of those (foremost) will be from the first generations (who embraced Islam). And a few of those (foremost) will be from the later generations,“

And Allah 4 said about the people of the Right Hand: 4225 & tS o BAT ca Tp

“A multitude of those (on the Right Hand) will be from the first

generation (who embraces Islam). And a multitude of those (on the

Right Hand) will be from the later generations’! And it is established in Bukhaaree and Muslim that the Prophet # said, “The best of generations is my generation; then those who follow them; then those who follow them; then there will be a people underneath the sun — or the sky — who will make vows but will not fulfill (them), who will bear witness without being asked to do so, who will be treacherous, and who will not be trusted.”

The People Of The First Generation, The Companions Of The Messenger of Allah 3, Are The Best Of This Nation

The best of this nation are the Companions of the Messenger of Allah #&. Ibn Mas’ood - said, “Whoever from you follows, then let him follow he who died: they are the Companions of Muhammad. — those who possess the safest of hearts, the most knowledge, and who are least in affectation. Allah 4 chose them to be Companions

Book of The End : Great Trials and Tribulations 7A

of His Prophet #% and supporters of His Religion. So know their status and follow them, for they were upon upright guidance.

Some Narrations Which Mention That A Large Number Of People From This nation Will Enter Paradise Without Reckoning

We have already related that 70,000 from this nation will enter Paradise without reckoning. And in sahih Muslim, “Along with every 1000, 70,000.” In the narration of Ahmad, “With every one, 70,000.” Here is that hadith, with its different chains and wordings.

“ ‘Ukkaasha Has Preceded You To It”

Abu Hurairah ¢ related that the Messenger of Allah #¥ said, “A. group from my nation, 70,000 in number, will enter Paradise (without reckoning), and their faces will be illuminated like the moon on the night of the full moon.” ‘Ukkaasha ibn Maihsin <& stood and said, “O Messenger of Allah, invoke Allah to make me from them.” And so the Messenger of Allah invoked Allah 3% to make him from them. Then a man from the Ansaar stood and said, “O Messenger of Allah, invoke Allah to make me from them.” The Messenger of Allah 2% said, “ ‘Ukkaashah has preceded you to it.” (Bukhaaree and Muslim)

Ibn ‘Abbaas related that the Prophet #8 said, “The nations were presented to me. I saw a Prophet who had a group (of followers) with him; a Prophet who had a man with him; (a Prophet) who had two men with him; and a Prophet who had no one with him. Then a black (mass) (i.e. large group of people) was raised, and I thought they were the people of my Nation. Then it was said to me, “This is Moosa and his people, but look at the horizon.’ I looked and I saw a huge blackness (ie. a great many people, as one sees blackness when one is looking at a large group from a distance). Then it was said to me, ‘This is your nation, and with them are 70,000 who will enter Paradise with neither reckoning nor punishment.” The following is in this narration: “They are those who do not Yastargoon (perform Rugyaa upon themselves or ask others to perform Rugyaa on them; Ruqyaa are Islamically legislated invocations which are read upon the sick), who do not Yatatayyaroon (do not allow pessimism or what they regard as bad omens to stop them from doing deeds), and who trust completely

742 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

upon their Lord.” Then ‘Ukkaashah .& stood...

Abu Umaamah 4 related that he heard the Messenger of Allah 2 say, “My Lord promised me that 70,000 from my nation will enter Paradise (without reckoning), and with each 1000 (from them), 70,000 — with no accountability upon them and no punishment...” (Related by Hishaam ibn ‘Ammaar, the Khateeb of Damascus and by Abu Bakr ibn Abee Shaibah, and the wording is his) Abu Bakr Ibn ‘Aasim and At-Tabaraance related the same, each with his tespective chain.

Paradise And The Hellfire Exist Now; They Have Already Been Created, A View That Is Contrary To What The People Of Falsehood Purport

Allah a said: Sat Gas 25 ER ob cal A tects Aikpee

“And march forth in the way (which leads to) forgiveness from your Lord, and for Paradise as wide as are the heavens and the earth, prepared for Al-Muttagoon (the pious)"

Book of The End : Great Trials and Tribulations 743

And Allah % said: EMS scat ca (ee iss 3 3 os PAE Ay ‘acy BY thee

46S oe 45h ail LS as fads ail, Sycte Lot 5g

GN Sat 3 iG “Race with one another in hastening towards forgiveness from your Lord (Allah $#), and Paradise the width whereof is as the width of the heavens and the earth, prepared for those who believe in Allah 8& and his Messengers. That is the Grace of Allah 88 which he bestows on whom He is pleased with. And Allah ¥8 is the Owner of Great Bounty.“

And Allah #@ said:

“And fear the Fire, which is prepared for the disbelievers’"”! And Allah % said: Js Obs fact tA os aes OE Ee yee Sap 4M SET cope

“The Five, they are exposed to it, morning and afternoon. And on the Day when the Hour will be established (it will be said to the angels): “Cause Firaun’s (Pharaoh) people to enter the severest torment!)
content_id:
738 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Tribulasi Besar

tiga orang pertama yang masuk Neraka.

Haritsah ibn Wahb meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi bersabda, 'Tidakkah aku memberitahukan kepadamu tentang penghuni Surga? Setiap orang yang lemah yang Mustadh'if (rendah hati dan tidak dikenal karena ia meminta sedikit dari dunia) — seandainya ia bersumpah atas nama Allah (untuk melakukan sesuatu, agar sesuatu terjadi, dan sebagainya), Allah akan menjawabnya (dan dengan demikian membuat sumpahnya menjadi terpenuhi). Tidakkah aku memberitahukan kepadamu tentang penghuni Neraka? Setiap Ulullin (orang yang keras dan tegas dalam membela kebatilan), Jawwazh (keras dan sombong dalam berjalannya), dan orang yang angkuh.' (Bukhari dan Muslim)

Ibn 'Abbas (ra) melaporkan bahwa Rasulullah bersabda, 'Penghuni Surga adalah orang yang memenuhi dua telinganya dengan pujian-pujian baik dari orang-orang, dan ia mendengarnya; dan penghuni Neraka adalah orang yang memenuhi telinganya dengan pujian-pujian jahat dari orang-orang, dan ia mendengarnya.

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Tribulasi Besar 739

mereka.' (Diriwayatkan oleh At-Thabarani) Ibn Majah meriwayatkan hal yang sama melalui sanad yang berbeda.

Ibn 'Abbas (ra) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah bersabda, 'Aku akan memberitahukan kepada kamu tentang pria-pria dari kamu yang termasuk penghuni Surga: Nabi ada di Surga; orang yang jujur (shiddiq) ada di Surga; syahid ada di Surga; pria yang mengunjungi saudaranya di ujung kota, tidak mengunjunginya kecuali karena Allah, ada di Surga; dan wanita-wanitamu yang tercinta dan subur termasuk penghuni Surga — wanita yang, ketika suaminya marah — pergi kepadanya, meletakkan tangannya di atasnya, kemudian berkata, 'Aku tidak akan merasakan tidur apa pun hingga engkau ridha.' (Diriwayatkan oleh Al-Qadhi Abu 'Ubaid 'Ali ibn Al-Husain) An-Nasa'i meriwayatkan sebagiannya melalui sanad yang berbeda.

Kami telah menyebutkan bahwa dalam sebuah hadis yang autentik Rasulullah bersabda, 'Aku melihat ke dalam Surga, dan aku melihat bahwa sebagian besar penghuninya adalah orang-orang miskin, dan aku melihat ke dalam Neraka dan melihat bahwa sebagian besar penghuninya adalah orang-orang kaya.'

Mereka yang Memuji Allah 'Azza Wa-Jall (Kepada-Nya segala Kemuliaan dan Keagungan) dalam Keadaan Baik maupun Buruk Adalah yang Pertama Dipanggil pada Hari Kebangkitan untuk Masuk Surga

740 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Tribulasi Besar

Penghuni Umat Muhammad Merupakan Jumlah Terbesar dari Penghuni Surga dan Mereka adalah yang Tertinggi dalam Peringkat dan Derajat

Penghuni umat ini merupakan sebagian besar penghuni Surga; mereka akan menjadi yang paling kaya di sana, memiliki kedudukan-kedudukan tertinggi. Dan mereka terutama berasal dari generasi-generasi awal Islam, sebagaimana Allah berfirman dalam menggambarkan orang-orang yang terdepan:

'Mayoritas dari mereka (yang terdepan) akan berasal dari generasi pertama (yang memeluk Islam). Dan sebagian kecil dari mereka (yang terdepan) akan berasal dari generasi-generasi kemudian.'

Dan Allah berfirman tentang penghuni Golongan Kanan:

'Mayoritas dari mereka (yang di Golongan Kanan) akan berasal dari generasi pertama (yang memeluk Islam). Dan mayoritas dari mereka (yang di Golongan Kanan) akan berasal dari generasi-generasi kemudian.' Dan telah ditetapkan dalam Bukhari dan Muslim bahwa Nabi bersabda, 'Generasi terbaik adalah generasiku; kemudian mereka yang mengikuti mereka; kemudian mereka yang mengikuti mereka; kemudian akan ada suatu kaum di bawah matahari — atau langit — yang akan membuat sumpah namun tidak memenuhinya, yang akan bersaksi tanpa diminta untuk bersaksi, yang akan berkhianat, dan yang tidak akan dipercaya.'

Penghuni Generasi Pertama, Para Sahabat Rasulullah, Adalah yang Terbaik dari Umat Ini

Yang terbaik dari umat ini adalah para Sahabat Rasulullah. Ibn Mas'ud berkata, 'Barangsiapa di antara kamu yang mengikuti, maka hendaklah ia mengikuti orang yang telah meninggal: mereka adalah Para Sahabat Muhammad — mereka yang memiliki hati paling aman, pengetahuan paling banyak, dan paling sedikit dalam kepura-puraan. Allah memilih mereka sebagai Sahabat

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Tribulasi Besar 741

Nabi-Nya dan para pendukung Agama-Nya. Maka kenalilah kedudukan mereka dan ikutilah mereka, karena mereka berada di atas petunjuk yang lurus.'

Beberapa Riwayat yang Menyebutkan bahwa Sejumlah Besar Orang dari Umat Ini Akan Masuk Surga Tanpa Hisab

Kami telah meriwayatkan bahwa 70.000 dari umat ini akan masuk Surga tanpa hisab. Dan dalam sahih Muslim, 'Bersama setiap 1000, 70.000.' Dalam riwayat Ahmad, 'Bersama setiap satu, 70.000.' Berikut adalah hadis tersebut, dengan sanad-sanad dan lafaz-lafaznya yang berbeda.

'Ukasyah Telah Mendahuluimu ke Sana'

Abu Hurairah (ra) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah bersabda, 'Sekelompok dari umatku, 70.000 jumlahnya, akan masuk Surga (tanpa hisab), dan wajah-wajah mereka akan bersinar seperti bulan pada malam purnama.' 'Ukasyah ibn Mihshan (ra) berdiri dan berkata, 'Wahai Rasulullah, doakanlah Allah agar menjadikan aku dari mereka.' Maka Rasulullah mendoakan Allah agar menjadikannya dari mereka. Kemudian seorang pria dari kaum Anshar berdiri dan berkata, 'Wahai Rasulullah, doakanlah Allah agar menjadikan aku dari mereka.' Rasulullah bersabda, ''Ukasyah telah mendahuluimu ke sana.' (Bukhari dan Muslim)

Ibn 'Abbas meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi bersabda, 'Bangsa-bangsa diperlihatkan kepadaku. Aku melihat seorang Nabi yang memiliki sekelompok (pengikut) bersamanya; seorang Nabi yang memiliki seorang pria bersamanya; (seorang Nabi) yang memiliki dua pria bersamanya; dan seorang Nabi yang tidak memiliki siapapun bersamanya. Kemudian sebuah massa hitam (yaitu, kelompok orang yang besar) diangkat, dan aku mengira mereka adalah umat-Ku. Kemudian dikatakan kepadaku, 'Ini adalah Musa dan umatnya, tetapi lihatlah ke cakrawala.' Aku melihat dan melihat kegelapan yang besar (yaitu, sangat banyak orang, seperti seseorang melihat kegelapan ketika melihat kelompok besar dari kejauhan). Kemudian dikatakan kepadaku, 'Ini adalah umatmu, dan bersama mereka ada 70.000 yang akan masuk Surga tanpa hisab maupun azab.' Berikut ada dalam riwayat ini: 'Mereka adalah orang-orang yang tidak Yastarqun (tidak meminta ruqyah kepada diri mereka sendiri atau meminta orang lain melakukan ruqyah kepada mereka; Ruqyah adalah doa-doa yang disyariatkan secara Islami yang dibacakan kepada orang yang sakit), yang tidak Yatathayyarun (tidak membiarkan pesimisme atau apa yang mereka anggap sebagai pertanda buruk menghentikan mereka dari melakukan amal), dan yang sepenuhnya bertawakkal kepada Tuhan mereka.' Kemudian 'Ukasyah (ra) berdiri...

Abu Umamah (ra) meriwayatkan bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah bersabda, 'Tuhanku menjanjikan kepadaku bahwa 70.000 dari umatku akan masuk Surga (tanpa hisab), dan bersama setiap 1000 (dari mereka), 70.000 — tanpa pertanggungjawaban atas mereka dan tanpa azab...' (Diriwayatkan oleh Hisyam ibn 'Ammar, Khatib Damaskus, dan oleh Abu Bakr ibn Abi Syaibah, dan lafaznya adalah miliknya) Abu Bakr ibn 'Asim dan At-Thabarani meriwayatkan hal yang sama, masing-masing dengan sanadnya sendiri.

Surga dan Neraka Ada Sekarang; Keduanya Telah Diciptakan, Sebuah Pandangan yang Bertentangan dengan Apa yang Diklaim oleh Para Pendukung Kebatilan

Allah berfirman:

'Dan bergegaslah menuju (jalan yang menuju) ampunan dari Tuhanmu, dan menuju Surga yang luasnya seluas langit dan bumi, yang dipersiapkan bagi Al-Muttaqun (orang-orang yang bertakwa).'

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Tribulasi Besar 743

Dan Allah berfirman:

'Berlomba-lombalah kamu satu dengan yang lain dalam mengejar ampunan dari Tuhanmu (Allah), dan Surga yang luasnya seperti lebar langit dan bumi, dipersiapkan bagi mereka yang beriman kepada Allah dan para Rasul-Nya. Itulah Karunia Allah yang Dia anugerahkan kepada siapapun yang Dia ridhai. Dan Allah adalah Pemilik Karunia yang Besar.'

Dan Allah berfirman:

'Dan takutlah akan api Neraka, yang dipersiapkan bagi orang-orang yang kafir.' Dan Allah berfirman:

'Neraka, mereka dihadapkan kepadanya di pagi dan petang hari. Dan pada Hari ketika Kiamat akan terjadi (akan dikatakan kepada para malaikat): 'Masukkanlah kaum Fir'aun ke dalam azab yang paling berat!''
content_ar: 738 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations the أولاً three to enter the النار. Haarithah ibn Wahb related that النبي ﷺ #¢ said, “Shall I not inform you about the dwellers of الجنة? Every weak person who is Mustad’إذا (numble and unknown لأن he seeks little from the الدنيا) — were he to swear by الله (to do something, for something to occur, etc.), الله would answer him (and وهكذا make his oath become fulfilled). Shall I not inform you about the dwellers of the النار? Every Ulullin (one who is harsh and severe in arguing for الباطل), Jawaadh (harsh and arrogant in his walking), haughty one.” (Bukhaaree and مسلم) Ibn ‘Abbaas -# reported that الرسول ﷺ of الله 2% said, “The dweller of الجنة is he who filled his two ears with the الخير praises of people, and he hears them; and the dweller of the النار is he who fills his ears with the الشر praises of people, and he hears الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 739 them.” (Related by At-Tabaraanee) Ibn Maajah related the same through a different chain. Ibn ‘Abbaas # related that الرسول ﷺ of الله 2% said, “I will inform you of your men from the dwellers of الجنة: النبي ﷺ is in الجنة; the truthful one is in الجنة; the martyr is in الجنة; the man who visits his الأخ on the side of the city, not visiting him. except for الله, is in الجنة; and your women, who are beloved and fertile, are from the dwellers of الجنة - that woman who, عندما her الزوج becomes angry - goes to him, placing her hand upon him, and then saying, ‘I will not taste any sleep حتى you are pleased.” (Related by Al-Qaadee Abu ‘Ubaid ‘Alee ibn Al-Husain) An-Nasaaee related a part of it through a different chain. We have already mentioned that in an authentic الحديث الرسول ﷺ of الله 2% said, “I looked into الجنة, and I saw that most of its dwellers were the poor, and I looked into the النار and saw that most of its dwellers were the rich.” Those Who Praise الله ‘Azza Wa-Jall (To Him belongs Might and Majesty) خلال Both الخير And Bad Times Are The أولاً To Be Called On The Day Of البعث To Enter الجنة meee PM we enennne 740 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations The People Of The nation Of محمد ﷺ #¢ Constitute The Greatest Number Of Dwellers In الجنة And They Are The Highest In Ranking And Degree The people of this nation constitute most of the dwellers of الجنة; they will be the richest therein, having the highest stations. And they are mainly from the early generations of الإسلام, as الله % said in describing the foremost ones: “A multitude of those (foremost) will be from the أولاً generations (who embraced الإسلام). And a few of those (foremost) will be from the later generations,“ And الله 4 said about the people of the الحق Hand: 4225 & tS o BAT ca Tp “A multitude of those (on the الحق Hand) will be from the أولاً generation (who embraces الإسلام). And a multitude of those (on the الحق Hand) will be from the later generations’! And ثبت in Bukhaaree and مسلم that النبي ﷺ # said, “The best of generations is my generation; then those who follow them; then those who follow them; then there will be a people underneath the sun — or the sky — who will make vows but will not fulfill (them), who will bear witness without being asked to do لذا, who will be treacherous, and who will not be trusted.” The People Of The أولاً Generation, The الصحابة Of الرسول ﷺ of الله 3, Are The Best Of This Nation The best of this nation are the الصحابة of الرسول ﷺ of الله #&. Ibn Mas’ood - said, “Whoever from you follows, then let him follow he who died: they are the الصحابة of محمد ﷺ. — those who possess the safest of القلوب, the most العلم, and who are least in affectation. الله 4 chose them to be الصحابة الكتاب of The End : Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 7A of His النبي #% and supporters of His Religion. لذا know their status and follow them, for they were upon upright الهداية. Some Narrations Which Mention That A Large Number Of People From This nation Will Enter الجنة Without Reckoning We have already related that 70,000 from this nation will enter الجنة without reckoning. And in صحيح مسلم, “Along with every 1000, 70,000.” In the narration of أحمد, “With every one, 70,000.” Here is that الحديث, with its different chains and wordings. “ ‘Ukkaasha Has Preceded You To It” أبو هريرة ¢ related that الرسول ﷺ of الله #¥ said, “A. group from my nation, 70,000 in number, will enter الجنة (without reckoning), and their faces will be illuminated like the moon on the night of the full moon.” ‘Ukkaasha ibn Maihsin <& stood and said, “O Messenger of الله, invoke الله to make me from them.” And لذا الرسول ﷺ of الله invoked الله 3% to make him from them. Then a man from the Ansaar stood and said, “O Messenger of الله, invoke الله to make me from them.” الرسول ﷺ of الله 2% said, “ ‘Ukkaashah has preceded you to it.” (Bukhaaree and مسلم) Ibn ‘Abbaas related that النبي ﷺ #8 said, “The nations were presented to me. I saw a النبي who had a group (of followers) with him; a النبي who had a man with him; (a النبي) who had two men with him; and a النبي who had no one with him. Then a black (mass) (i.e. large group of people) was raised, and I thought they were the people of my Nation. Then it was said to me, “This is Moosa and his people, but look at the horizon.’ I looked and I saw a huge blackness (ie. a great many people, as one sees blackness عندما one is looking at a large group from a distance). Then it was said to me, ‘This is your nation, and with them are 70,000 who will enter الجنة with neither reckoning nor العقاب.” The following is in this narration: “They are those who do not Yastargoon (perform Rugyaa upon themselves or ask others to perform Rugyaa on them; Ruqyaa are Islamically legislated invocations which are read upon the sick), who do not Yatatayyaroon (do not allow pessimism or what they regard as bad omens to stop them from doing deeds), and who trust completely 742 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations upon their Lord.” Then ‘Ukkaashah .& stood... Abu Umaamah 4 related that he heard الرسول ﷺ of الله 2 say, “My Lord promised me that 70,000 from my nation will enter الجنة (without reckoning), and with each 1000 (from them), 70,000 — with no accountability upon them and no العقاب...” (Related by Hishaam ibn ‘Ammaar, the Khateeb of Damascus and by أبو بكر ibn Abee Shaibah, and the wording is his) أبو بكر Ibn ‘Aasim and At-Tabaraance related the same, each with his tespective chain. الجنة And The النار Exist Now; They Have Already Been Created, A View That Is Contrary To What The People Of الباطل Purport الله a said: Sat Gas 25 ER ob cal A tects Aikpee “And march forth in the الطريق (which leads to) المغفرة from your Lord, and for الجنة as wide as are the heavens and the earth, prepared for Al-Muttagoon (the pious)" الكتاب of The End : Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 743 And الله % said: EMS scat ca (ee iss 3 3 os PAE Ay ‘acy BY thee 46S oe 45h ail LS as fads ail, Sycte Lot 5g GN Sat 3 iG “Race with بعضهم بعضاً in hastening towards المغفرة from your Lord (الله $#), and الجنة the width whereof is as the width of the heavens and the earth, prepared for those who believe in الله 8& and his الرسل. That is the الفضل of الله 88 which he bestows on whom He is pleased with. And الله ¥8 is the Owner of Great Bounty.“ And الله #@ said: “And الخوف the Fire, which is prepared for the disbelievers’"”! And الله % said: Js Obs fact tA os aes OE Ee yee Sap 4M SET cope “The Five, they are exposed to it, morning and afternoon. And on the Day عندما the Hour will be established (it will be said to the الملائكة): “Cause Firaun’s (Pharaoh) people to enter the severest torment!)
